from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, udf, lit, when, lower, trim
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StringType, StructType, StructField
import pandas as pd

cup_society_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/CUP/society/CUP_Society_List.csv'
cup_price_ListPath_excel = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/CUP/import/PriceList.xlsx'
cup_price_ListPath_csv = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/CUP/priceList/PriceList.csv'
cup_siver_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/CUP/all'
Year = 2025
sheet_name = "January 2025 Cambridge APC V1"
useCols = 'A:S'
skiprow = 7
nrow= 428

# create a cup journal df
df = pd.read_excel(
    cup_price_ListPath_excel,
    sheet_name=sheet_name,
    usecols=useCols,       # Reads columns A to Z
    skiprows=skiprow,          # Skips the first 2 rows (so it starts from the 3rd row)
    nrows=nrow            # Reads a total of 232 rows (from row 3 to row 234)
)
# Store the df as csv
df.to_csv(cup_price_ListPath_csv, index=False)

schema = StructType([
    StructField("Mnemonic", StringType(), True),
    StructField("Journal", StringType(), True),
    StructField("Print ISSN", StringType(), True),
    StructField("Online ISSN", StringType(), True),
    StructField("New to Cambridge 2024", StringType(), True),
    StructField("New to Cambridge 2025", StringType(), True),
    StructField("HSS_STM", StringType(), True),
    StructField("model", StringType(), True),
    StructField("GBP", StringType(), True),
    StructField("GBP Member Rate", StringType(), True),
    StructField("USD", StringType(), True),
    StructField("USD Member Rate", StringType(), True),
    StructField("EUR", StringType(), True),
    StructField("EUR Member Rate", StringType(), True),
    StructField("AUD", StringType(), True),
    StructField("AUD Member Rate", StringType(), True),
    StructField("APC Notes", StringType(), True),
    StructField("Licence", StringType(), True),
    StructField("url", StringType(), True)
])

journal_df = spark.read.csv(cup_price_ListPath_csv,schema=schema)

# create APC_Import 1 DF

new_df = journal_df.select(
    lit("CUP").alias("Publisher"),
    col("Print ISSN").alias("ISSN1"),
    col("Online ISSN").alias("ISSN2"),
    col("Journal").alias("Title"),
    lit("Publisher Price List").alias("Source"),
    col("model").alias("Model_temp"),
    col("Licence").alias("Model Notes"),
    col("USD").alias("APC"),
    lit("USD").alias("Currency"),
    col("Licence").alias("License Types"),
    lit(Year).alias("Year"),
    col("Mnemonic").alias("PublisherID"),
    col("Mnemonic").alias("JoiningID"),
    lit("").alias("Imprint")
)

new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "Model",  # new column name for the updated status
    F.when((F.col("Model_temp").like("Hybrid OA")) | (F.col("Model_temp").like("Research Open")), "Hybrid")
     .when(F.col("Model_temp").startswith("Gold OA"), "Fully OA")
     .otherwise("None")

# Perform a left join on 'PublisherID' from new_df and 'Mnemonic' from cup_society_df
new_df_with_ownership = new_df.join(cup_society_df, new_df.PublisherID == cup_society_df.Mnemonic, 'left') \
                              .select(new_df["*"], cup_society_df["Society"])

desired_columns = [
    "Publisher", "ISSN1", "ISSN2", "Title", "Source", "Model", "Model Notes",
    "APC", "Currency", "License Types", "Year", "PublisherID", "JoiningID",
    "Imprint", "Society"
]

# Reorder the columns based on desired schema
df_reordered = new_df_with_ownership.select([col for col in desired_columns if col in new_df.columns])
